name: Infected Wolf Spider

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It opens pressure with a simple bite similar to a normal wolf spider.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or roll out of the short front line.
attacks.notes: It still applies poison even though it is not one of its explosive attacks.

attacks.name: Explosive 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It chains three fast bites and each impact releases explosive spores.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not trade inside the sequence: leave after the first hit or be ready to perfect block the whole chain.
attacks.notes: Only part of this combo can be blocked cleanly because of the secondary blasts; it is one of its harshest punish tools.

attacks.name: 5-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: Its infected form speeds up the long bite string compared to a normal wolf spider.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish before the final hit; the cadence is much faster than on the base version.
attacks.notes: The constant pressure makes any blocking mistake extremely costly.

attacks.name: Explosive Jump Attack
attacks.tell: It leaps like a normal wolf spider, but releases a spore explosion on landing.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge the landing and keep backing off a little farther so the fungal burst does not catch you.
attacks.notes: This is one of the clearest examples of its threat extending far beyond the point of contact.

attacks.name: Explosive Spore Shot
attacks.tell: It launches an explosive spore at far or unreachable targets, similar to an orb weaver web shot.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep the projectile and do not cross back through the area if the spore sticks into the ground.
attacks.notes: If it does not impact immediately, the spore remains as a mine and explodes when approached; a direct hit also webs the player in place.

description: The most dangerous evolution among common infected creatures. It never sleeps, patrols constantly, and mixes wolf spider aggression with explosions and trap spores.
behavior: Unlike a normal wolf spider, it never sleeps. It patrols a small area constantly and can keep pressing even when the player tries to disengage or gain elevation.
interactionWithPlayer: It is brutally hostile and chases the player over long distances. When it cannot reach in melee, it uses the spore shot to force continued movement.
interactionWithCreatures: It attacks almost every yard creature except other infected ones and normal wolf spiders, which usually remain neutral until stray damage breaks the truce.
strategy: Do not fight it as if it were merely a faster wolf spider. You need space to read the spore shot, avoid the explosive jump, and stay out of its accelerated combo pressure.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 140
Explosive 3-Combo Bite: 120
5-Combo Bite: 100
Explosive Jump: 160
Spore Shot: 40

specialTraits: It is immune to gas hazard and highly resistant to poison. A direct spore shot can immobilize the player in place.

abilities.name: Spore Mine
abilities.description: If the spore shot does not connect immediately, it sticks into the ground and explodes when someone gets too close.
